diagrams.title: Use Case Diagram
diagrams.description: A graphical representation of the use cases and actors in a system.
diagrams.purpose: To identify and describe the functional requirements of a system from the user's perspective.

diagrams.title: Use Case Scenario
diagrams.description: A description of the sequence of events that occurs during a use case.
diagrams.purpose: To describe the sequence of events that occurs during a use case.
